items.snippet: The stablecoin issuer is extending its tokenized gold strategy by allowing holders of XAUT to borrow against their bullion, mirroring bitcoin-backed lending without selling the underlying asset.

items.title: BonfireStellar Wallet has integrated CCTP for cross-chain USDC transfers!
items.snippet: ​ We’re excited to share that BonfireStellar Wallet has integrated Circle’s CCTP, giving users a smoother way to move native USDC across supported chains. The goal is simple: make cross-chain USDC transfers easier without forcing users to jump between multiple apps, bridges, tabs, or confusing steps. BonfireStellar Wallet brings the process directly into the app so users can move value with more confidence and less friction. For Stellar users, this is a big step toward connecting fast, low-cost...
items.author: /u/Bonfirestellar_

items.title: MoneyGram CEO on rolling out MGUSD to its 60 million users, globally
items.snippet: MoneyGram has been quietly building on blockchain for over five years. Now, with its own stablecoin (MGUSD), a Kraken partnership, a validator seat on the Tempo network, and $2B+ in stablecoin settlements already running — the pace is accelerating.
items.author: Chris Storaker

coverage_notes: X/Twitter direct monitoring is not enabled because official API read access is paid. This dashboard avoids scraping or bypassing access controls.
Bluesky search uses the public endpoint when available. If it returns 403, add free-account BSKY_IDENTIFIER and BSKY_APP_PASSWORD repository secrets.
Reddit RSS and Mastodon public search may be rate-limited or incomplete depending on the platform.
YouTube search is optional and only runs when a free-quota YOUTUBE_API_KEY secret is configured.
